title: Linko-POS Version 1.3.19 Update Notes
overall_goal: To provide an overview of the new features, functional improvements, and bug fixes introduced in Linko-POS Desktop version 1.3.19.
rag_description: This technical update for Linko-POS Desktop version 1.3.19 introduces key enhancements to the sales workflow and label printing. Major features include the 'Favorite Products' section on the main sales screen for quick access and a receipt rounding function. The update also improves price tag management by allowing large-format pricing and custom text, while fixing layout issues where text overlapped barcodes. Performance-wise, the system now features optimized synchronization for inventory and sales data, alongside fixes for weighted product barcode generation and supplier return processes. This document serves as a guide for users to understand these new capabilities and the resolved technical issues.

content.description: A 'Favorite Products' section has been added to the system. Users can now quickly add frequently sold items to their favorites list. For faster access during transactions, this favorites list is now displayed directly on the main screen of the sales department.

To further streamline the sales process, a receipt rounding button has been added. Additionally, the system now provides visibility into specific errors encountered during the product import and update process, making data management more transparent.

The price tag settings have been upgraded to support printing in a large price format and the inclusion of custom user-defined text. A layout fix ensures that even if a product name exceeds the character limit, it will no longer overlap or obscure the price or barcode.

The barcode generation randomizer has been corrected, specifically addressing issues with weighted products. Errors in the supplier return process have been resolved. Furthermore, synchronization speed has been optimized for sales, stock entry, inventory, and product modification processes.
